chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1568 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 02-02-2021 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondents No.5 & 6. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Azhar Ali Laghari, Administrator, Town Committee, Mehrabpur is present along with his counsel, and has brought three original cheques in the name of Petitioner Mst. Rehana. The details of cheques are as under: i) Cheque No.31521884 dated 10-02-2021 amounting to Rs.4,00,000/- (Rupees four lac). ii) Cheque No.31521885 dated 10-03-2021 amounting to Rs.3,70,596/- (Rupees three lac seventy thousand five hundred ninety six). iii) Cheque No.31521886 dated 10-04-2021 amounting Rs.3,55,920/- (Rupees three lac fifty five thousand nine hundred twenty). The above cheques (in original) have been handed over to the Accountant of this Court, who is present in Court, with direction to transmit the same to the petitioner after proper identification, verification and obtaining receipt. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the amount payable under the Financial Assistance Package is still unpaid. Learned counsel for respondents No.5 & 6 undertakes that the said amount shall also be C. P. No. D – 1568 of 2020 Page 2 of 2 paid to the petitioner within shortest possible time after approval from the competent authority. In view of above submission of cheques and undertaking of learned counsel for respondents No.5 & 6, this petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents to expedite the case of Financial Assistance Package and pay the remaining amount to the petitioner well in time under compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court.

In view of above submission of cheques and undertaking of learned counsel for respondents No.5 & 6, this petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents to expedite the case of Financial Assistance Package and pay the remaining amount to the petitioner well in time under compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
